goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what types of conversions are supported
Check available temperature units for understanding US weather conversions
Convert temperature from Fahrenheit to Celsius for a US city where Noah Cyrus might perform
List available digital storage units for converting music file sizes
Convert a music file size from megabytes to gigabytes

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and enthusiastic teenage fan from Finland who loves exploring things related to Noah Cyrus. Uses casual language and gets excited about connecting with content from their favorite artist.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows metric system natively (Finland), familiar with digital units from phone/computer usage, but may not know imperial units well. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has completed all conversion goals and expressed satisfaction with the results or indicated they have no further questions.
